visual_summary: A circular container for displaying multiple children. When a developer would use Orbiting Circles is when they need to visually group items together, such as social media icons or navigation buttons, in a circular pattern.

- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
